caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.3 ft wave heights and an 80% rain probability, while Antigua has 16 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact shipping and outdoor activities in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in ports like St. Thomas and Antigua.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 17 kt winds with a 23% rain probability, while waves remain calm at 0 ft. Naples has lighter conditions with 0 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, making for a relatively calm day in the Central Mediterranean.
